name: marshal
description: The Merge Marshal: a serial, deterministic composed-state merge backstop for any shared repo. FIFO over ready, approved PRs; rebase onto trunk (or refuse per the D7.0 file/hunk budget with a kickback); build-status on the POST-REBASE head — the composed-state verification that catches Composition Breaks two clean merges hide; green merges, red is evicted, one PR in flight, no speculation. Wiring, not a checker: every decision is a timestamp, a sha, a build state, or a file-surface intersection — no agent judgment in the merge path. Host-agnostic through one adapter (GitHub + Bitbucket DC). Ships the vendored claim-overlap check and the 48h branch-age watcher. Installs standalone with zero Bazel, zero autopilot, zero spec tier.
